title: sb-health property→token-family rules
description: Designer-owned rules: which design-token family is allowed on which CSS property. sb-health's check-property-tokens.py reads this to flag a valid, declared token used on the wrong property (e.g. a container token used as text color). Owned by the designer; the linter script never needs editing.

propertyTokens.description: Map of CSS property → allowed token prefixes. A trailing '*' on the key makes it a property family (background* → background, background-color, …). Values are token PREFIXES (--color-border allows --color-border and --color-border-strong). Only properties listed here are governed; everything else is ignored, so you opt in property-by-property.
